class.name: WebTransportPeer
class.brief_description: A [MultiplayerPeer] that transports packets over WebTransport (HTTP/3 + QUIC).
class.description:
WebTransportPeer implements [MultiplayerPeer] using WebTransport over HTTP/3 and QUIC. It supports both client and server roles. [b]Transfer modes:[/b] - [constant MultiplayerPeer.TRANSFER_MODE_UNRELIABLE] and [constant MultiplayerPeer.TRANSFER_MODE_UNRELIABLE_ORDERED] send packets as QUIC datagrams. - [constant MultiplayerPeer.TRANSFER_MODE_RELIABLE] opens a fresh bidirectional QUIC stream per packet.
[b]Server usage:[/b] [codeblocks] [gdscript] var crypto = Crypto.new() var key = crypto.generate_ecdsa() var now = int(Time.get_unix_time_from_system()) var cert = crypto.generate_self_signed_certificate_san( key, "CN=godot-wt", _fmt_validity(now), _fmt_validity(now + 13 * 86400), PackedStringArray(["DNS:localhost", "IP:127.0.0.1"])) var ctx = HashingContext.new() ctx.start(HashingContext.HASH_SHA256) ctx.update(cert.get_der()) var hash = Marshalls.raw_to_base64(ctx.finish()) var peer = WebTransportPeer.new() peer.create_server(54370, "/wt", cert, key) print("Pin this hash in serverCertificateHashes: ", hash) [/gdscript] [/codeblocks]
[b]Client usage:[/b] [codeblocks] [gdscript] var peer = WebTransportPeer.new() peer.create_client("127.0.0.1", 54370, "/wt") [/gdscript] [/codeblocks]

method.name: create_client
method.description: Dials a WebTransport server at [param host]:[param port][param path] using the spec-correct HTTP/3 + QUIC path (picowt). Returns [constant OK] on success. The connection handshake proceeds asynchronously; poll [method MultiplayerPeer.get_connection_status] until it reaches [constant MultiplayerPeer.CONNECTION_CONNECTED]. Falls back to a raw QUIC connection with ALPN [code]"webtransport"[/code] if no session backend is registered (e.g. picoquic not compiled in).

method.name: create_server
method.description: Starts a WebTransport server on [param port] accepting connections at [param path], using the provided [param cert] and [param key]. Build the certificate in GDScript using [method Crypto.generate_ecdsa] and [method Crypto.generate_self_signed_certificate_san]. The certificate must have ≤14-day validity to satisfy WebTransport's [code]serverCertificateHashes[/code] constraint. After a successful call, compute the SHA-256 fingerprint from [method X509Certificate.get_der] using [HashingContext] and pass it to browser clients as [code]serverCertificateHashes[/code]. Returns [constant OK] on success, [constant ERR_UNAVAILABLE] if the picoquic backend is not compiled in, or another error if network binding fails. [b]Note:[/b] Only one server instance is supported at a time.

method.name: get_quic
method.description: Returns the underlying [QUICClient] used by this peer, or [code]null[/code] if the session is using the WebTransport session backend (the common case after [method create_client]).

constants.constant: No role assigned. Initial state before [method create_client] or [method create_server].
